## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint`, `bun run check-types`, and `bun run build` pass
- [ ] No `float` for money — integer minor units + currency only
- [ ] Signature/token comparisons use constant-time `timingSafeEqual`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or gateway sample keys committed
- [ ] Public API changes are intentional and documented
